variants: Worn floorboards. Dust settled in the grooves.
A grease stain from some old work.
Floorboards, smooth from years of passage.
Something small and unidentifiable has been swept to one side.

T.default: A tree. Its leaves are still.
variants: A gnarled tree. Moss gathers at the base.
An oak, or something like it. Old.
The branches cross overhead. No fruit.
A tree with a hollow at the base, just large enough for a hand.
Leaves overhead. Light comes through in patches.

:.default: A dirt path, worn by foot traffic.
variants: The path here is packed hard.
A well-trodden route. Someone has paced it many times.
Stones pressed into the dirt to keep it dry.
A boundary. Beyond it, the wider world.
Rough stone. Cold to the touch.
